{{Quote|The Imperial Star Destroyers ''Bombard'' and ''Crusader'' limped back to Ord Grovner Naval Base this week after dealing a death-blow to the arrogant and once-almighty Eyttyrmin Pirates of the Khuiumin system.|[[TriNebulon News/Legends|TriNebulon News]]|<ref name="GNN6">{{JournalCite|6|Galaxywide NewsNets}}</ref>}}
'''''Crusader''''' was a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
Commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Zlece Oonaar]], this ship, along with her sister ship ''[[Bombard]]'', destroyed the [[Eyttyrmin Batiiv]] pirate armada at the [[Battle of Khuiumin]].

''Crusader'' supported ''Bombard'' from a distance during the battle, remaining in position to intercept the fleeing pirates. After routing the Eyttyrmin Batiiv armada, she destroyed their stronghold on the surface of [[Courkrus|Khuiumin]] with a barrage of [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missiles]].
